title: Normalized Retrieval Events
description: Schema for step-level retrieval events extracted from agent traces. Used by the standalone retrieval evaluation pipeline to compute IR metrics, utilization probes, and downstream impact analyses. Version 1.0.

coverage.description: Flags indicating trace and ground-truth availability.

ground_truth.description: Expected files and optional symbols for this task.

events.description: Ordered list of step-level retrieval events extracted from the agent trace. Empty when coverage.has_trajectory is false (degraded mode).

summary.description: Optional pre-computed summary counts over the events array.

has_trajectory.description: True if agent/trajectory.json was available and parseable.

has_transcript.description: True if agent/claude-code.txt (JSONL) was available and parseable.

has_ground_truth.description: True if file-level ground truth exists for this task.

has_chunk_ground_truth.description: True if chunk/line-level ground truth exists (e.g. defect annotations).

trace_source.description: Which trace source produced the events. 'merged' when both sources were combined. Null in degraded mode.

degraded_reason.description: Human-readable explanation when events array is empty or incomplete. Null when fully covered.

ground_truth_confidence.description: Confidence level of ground truth extraction.

files.description: Repo-relative file paths the agent should have accessed. Empty when coverage.has_ground_truth is false.

symbols.description: Optional expected symbols (function/class names) within ground-truth files.

chunks.description: Optional line-range annotations within ground-truth files. Present only when coverage.has_chunk_ground_truth is true.

file.description: Repo-relative file path containing the symbol.

repo.description: Repository name for cross-repo tasks. Null for single-repo tasks.

line_start.description: 1-based start line of the relevant chunk.

line_end.description: 1-based end line (inclusive) of the relevant chunk.

annotation.description: Optional label (e.g. defect type, relevance category).

step_index.description: Zero-based ordinal position within the agent trace.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the tool call. Null if not available in trace.

tool_name.description: Raw tool name from the trace, e.g. 'Read', 'mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file', 'Grep'.

is_mcp.description: True if the tool call went through an MCP server (Sourcegraph).

arguments.description: Salient tool arguments (file paths, search patterns, symbol names). Schema varies by tool_category.

target_files.description: Repo-relative file paths accessed or returned by this event. Normalized (no /workspace/ prefix, no diff a/b prefix).

target_symbols.description: Symbols referenced in this event (for symbol_navigation category).

hits_ground_truth.description: True if any target_file matches a ground-truth file.

matched_ground_truth_files.description: Subset of ground_truth.files matched by this event's target_files.

is_subagent.description: True if this event originated from a subagent (Task tool) rather than the main agent.

cumulative_tokens.description: Cumulative input+output tokens consumed up to and including this step. Null if not available.

elapsed_seconds.description: Seconds elapsed from agent execution start to this step. Null if timestamps unavailable.

total_events.description: Total retrieval events in the events array.

mcp_events.description: Count of events where is_mcp is true.

local_events.description: Count of events where is_mcp is false.

unique_files_accessed.description: Count of distinct files across all target_files.

ground_truth_files_hit.description: Count of distinct ground-truth files matched by at least one event.

ground_truth_files_total.description: Total ground-truth files for this task.

first_ground_truth_hit_step.description: Step index of the first event that hits ground truth. Null if no ground truth hit.
